---
name: Bug report
about: Report something in Tag Studio that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open '...' (blank label / which template)
2. Add / select '...'
3. Export to '...' or click '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / exported output

If applicable, add screenshots of the canvas or attach the exported file
(PDF / SVG / PNG / ZPL). Please remove any sensitive data first.

## Where it happens

- [ ] Canvas / design (place, move, rotate, resize, align, undo/redo)
- [ ] Barcodes (Code 128B / Code 39 / QR)
- [ ] Data binding / batch (CSV / Excel merge)
- [ ] Export — standard (PDF / SVG / PNG)
- [ ] Export — machine (Trotec / Panduit / Roland / ZPL)
- [ ] Templates (bundled library / saving your own `.json`)
- [ ] Install / update (installer or in-app auto-update)
- [ ] Other

If it's an export bug, which target and format? <!-- e.g. Roland BN-20A, PDF -->

## Environment

- Windows version: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 23H2, 64-bit -->
- Tag Studio version: <!-- Help/About, or the installer filename, e.g. 0.3.1 -->
- Installed how: <!-- signed installer / in-app auto-update -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — does it happen every time, only with a
particular template, only after an update, only for one export target, etc.?
